name: M3GAN
description:
“You seriously thought you were Safe?”

-It’s been a year or so since the M3GAN incident at Funki, and mysteriously, even though orders never shipped, a box labeled as being from Funki ends up at your doorstep..

Note: Anyone else hyped for M3GAN 2.0?
